chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 130 of 2022 ITRA 131 of 2022 ITRA 132 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.11, 20, 26 & 27. 2. For orders on CMA No.164/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 17.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. These reference applications are pending since 2022 and even notice has not been issued / sought till date. Today learned counsel is appeared buffered of his file and expresses inability to assist. It appears that the Commissioner Inland Revenue, Legal Zone, CTO, the applicant in this case has no interest in these proceedings, which are accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
